query: Could you create a 5-day travel plan for a couple leaving from Baton Rouge and visiting 2 cities in Texas from March 16th to March 20th, 2022? We have allocated a budget of $2,900 for this trip. Important to note is that our travels will not involve any flights; we prefer other modes of transportation. For our lodgings, we insist on not shared rooms, and notably, we will be traveling with our pet, hence the need for pet-friendly accommodations.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Baton Rouge to Abilene, duration: 8 hours 50 mins, distance: 976 km, cost: 48

plan.attraction: The Grace Museum;Frontier Texas!;Historic Fort Phantom Hill;12th Armored Division Memorial;National Center for Children's Illustrated Literature;
plan.accommodation: Joyce and Donovan's, Room for One, Abilene

plan.attraction: Abilene Zoo;Everman Park;'Good Night Dinosaur' Statue;'Dino Bob' Statue;Giant Buffalo Skull;'Sanderson Mansnoozie' Statue;'Yertle the Turtle' Statue;'E. Aster Bunnymund' Statue;'Stuart Little' Statue;'Toothiana' Statue;'The Lorax' Statue;'The Three Little Pigs' Statue;
plan.accommodation: Joyce and Donovan's, Room for One, Abilene

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Abilene to Amarillo, duration: 4 hours 10 mins, distance: 446 km, cost: 22

plan.attraction: Cadillac Ranch;Amarillo Botanical Gardens;Amarillo Zoo;Don Harrington Discovery Center;Texas Air & Space Museum;Amarillo Museum of Art;2nd Amendment Cowboy;American Quarter Horse Hall of Fame & Museum;Wildcat Bluff Nature Center;Wonderland Amusement Park;
